## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.11

### Camera Events
- Keeps the camera AI Detection event entity pre-created, but disables it by default when the APK AI service list proves the account has no usable AI service.
- Leaves the Motion event entity available when AI services are absent, using the regular APK camera record-history path.

### Debugging
- Clarifies camera history routing debug output so Motion records report the event timestamp path instead of looking for the removed camera `isMoved` state.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for AI Detection being disabled by default when no AI service is available.
- Adds regression coverage that regular Motion history still updates when the AI service list is empty.
